# atlassian_jira_issue_type_scheme (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud issue type scheme.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_issue_type_scheme" "example" {
  name = "Example Issue Type Scheme"
  issue_type_ids = [
    atlassian_jira_issue_type.example.id,
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `issue_type_ids` (List of String) An ordered list of issue type IDs in the scheme. Order is preserved.
- `name` (String) The name of the issue type scheme.

### Optional

- `default_issue_type_id` (String) The ID of the default issue type of the issue type scheme.
- `description` (String) The description of the issue type scheme.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the issue type scheme.
